name: FINEDIGITAL Inc.
summary: FINEDIGITAL Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells products and solutions in the fields of mobile telecommunication and automotive IT in South Korea. It offers drive recorders; car navigation products; golf GPS rangefinders; and communication systems, such as compact spectrum analyzers, radio frequency source finders, and repeaters, as well as RF inspection and supervisory, jamming, and remote monitoring and control solutions. The company was formerly known as Grim Electronics co.,LTD. and changed its name to FINEDIGITAL Inc. in September 1999. FINEDIGITAL Inc. was founded in 1992 and is based in Seongnam, South Korea.
